description: WooCommerce DB/API fuzz campaign declaration tying public Codebox fuzz-suite execution to WordPress hotspot artifacts, Homeboy coverage, Homeboy hotspot summary, and gap-report outputs without claiming proof before reviewer-facing artifacts exist.

fixture_contracts.handoff_path: Rigs manifests -> HBEX opt-in ingestion -> Codebox mutation runner -> Homeboy artifacts
fixture_contracts.blocked_until: HBEX consumes the opt-ins, Codebox executes rollback-safe mutations, and Homeboy records durable reviewer-facing artifact refs.

postprocess.boundary_note: The Woo helper declares the intended artifact-postprocess IO shape locally while upstream Homeboy generic artifact-postprocess and hotspot aggregation primitives are still pending. These outputs are not proof until collected as reviewer-facing Homeboy artifact refs from an approved offloaded run.
blocked_until: Homeboy owns a generic artifact-postprocess primitive for persisted run artifact roots.
Homeboy owns a generic hotspot aggregation primitive instead of Woo-specific ranking labels in rig tooling.
The runner collects declared fuzz.report JSON artifacts as reviewer-facing evidence.

artifact_roots.ref_requirement: reviewer-facing Homeboy artifact root from the approved offloaded campaign run set

outputs.artifact_ref_requirement: reviewer-facing coverage gap report artifact ref from the offloaded postprocess run
reviewer-facing performance hotspot summary artifact ref from the offloaded postprocess run

operator_commands.note: Run these through an approved Homeboy Lab/runner/offloaded environment. Do not use local benchmark execution as proof for this campaign.
operator_commands.reviewer_evidence_refs_command: homeboy runs refs --rig woocommerce-performance --kind fuzz --status completed --tracker-ref "$WC_TRACKER_REF" --artifact-kind canonical_fuzz_envelope --artifact-kind codebox_fuzz_suite_result --artifact-kind wordpress_hotspots --artifact-kind homeboy_fuzz_coverage --artifact-kind coverage_gap_report --artifact-kind performance_hotspots_summary
operator_commands.postprocess_note: The coverage-gap-report and performance-hotspots-artifact-summary workloads use the product-local Woo helper to mirror the intended homeboy.artifact-postprocess contract against the offloaded ${artifacts.root}; their helper/action/input/output/parameters contracts are declared in postprocess.outputs and must be collected as reviewer-facing artifacts before proven readiness.
commands: homeboy fuzz run --rig woocommerce-performance --workload codebox-fuzz-suite-smoke --run-id wc-db-api-codebox-suite --seed 1 --max-duration 10m --tracker-ref "$WC_TRACKER_REF"
homeboy fuzz run --rig woocommerce-performance --workload woocommerce-rest-route-inventory --run-id wc-db-api-route-inventory --seed 1 --max-duration 10m --tracker-ref "$WC_TRACKER_REF"
homeboy fuzz run --rig woocommerce-performance --workload generated-rest-request-cases --run-id wc-db-api-generated-cases --seed 1 --max-duration 20m --tracker-ref "$WC_TRACKER_REF"
homeboy fuzz run --rig woocommerce-performance --workload rest-db-query-profile --run-id wc-db-api-query-profile --seed 1 --max-duration 20m --tracker-ref "$WC_TRACKER_REF"
homeboy fuzz run --rig woocommerce-performance --workload db-inventory --run-id wc-db-api-db-inventory --seed 1 --max-duration 10m --tracker-ref "$WC_TRACKER_REF"
homeboy fuzz run --rig woocommerce-performance --workload rest-schema-query-attribution --run-id wc-db-api-schema-query-attribution --seed 1 --max-duration 20m --tracker-ref "$WC_TRACKER_REF"
homeboy fuzz run --rig woocommerce-performance --workload coverage-gap-report --run-id wc-db-api-coverage-gap-report --seed 1 --max-duration 15m --tracker-ref "$WC_TRACKER_REF"
homeboy fuzz run --rig woocommerce-performance --workload performance-hotspots-artifact-summary --run-id wc-db-api-hotspots-summary --seed 1 --max-duration 15m --tracker-ref "$WC_TRACKER_REF"

readiness.coverage_contract: The campaign is executable only through the declared Woo fuzz workloads in an approved offloaded WP Codebox/Homeboy runner. It remains declared until reviewer-facing artifact refs exist for Codebox fuzz-suite results, WordPress hotspot artifacts, Homeboy fuzz coverage, Homeboy hotspot summary, and the coverage gap report.

required_refs: reviewer-facing Homeboy fuzz coverage artifact ref
reviewer-facing Homeboy hotspot summary artifact ref
reviewer-facing coverage gap report artifact ref

upstream_blockers: Public Codebox fuzz-suite execution must emit reviewer-facing wp-codebox/fuzz-suite-result/v1 artifacts for the Woo DB/API generated contract.
WordPress hotspot discovery must emit reviewer-facing wp-codebox/wordpress-hotspots/v1 artifacts for the same run set.
Homeboy fuzz execution must collect coverage, hotspot summary, and gap-report artifacts from the offloaded run before readiness can become proven.
